comment.body:
Going to do my best here but ill try to explain the dynamics the best i can and try to address the confusion as to "when the dip was"....So to start, we're following gamma levels pretty closely, you could kind of see that above 5500. We also have end of month + seasonal buying and CTA's all coming together to provide some market support (remember RV down means the price isn't moving as much so liquidity is coming in). As long as we remained above 5400-ish i could see options creating support (charm/vanna/gamma etc). Those are the dynamics i think creating this weeks PA and then earnings add in volatility. Remember the deepseek thing? We dropped like 3% but then rocketed back up. Same dynamics are at play here creating a supportive environment. Ok so thats sort of the landscape we are in and why i think it was a buy the dip scenario.

 So how high do we go now? 5650 is the next target that we will drift towards. MAG7 earnings will likely cause front end vix to drop a bit which will then give a vanna boost. If apple earnings come in good then it could drop that even more and we'd see something like 5725 maybe an overshoot to 5765.  A lot of the negative headline news still needs to make its way through the economy which could start as early as next week. But if tomorrow's data releases are benign then i could see continued upside.
